evidence_direction_note: RECLASSIFIED 2026-04-11 governance. SD-019: mixed (not does_not_support). C1 (cosine_sq_nonredundant < baseline) passes 2/5 seeds; wrong direction in 3/5. C2 (abs cosine_sq < 0.5) passes all 5 seeds -- both streams have low absolute cosine regardless. The inconsistency is the expected fingerprint of a nonredundancy objective applied to a collinear information source: when both z_harm_s and z_harm_a derive from the same 50-dim proximity EMA, the loss has nothing stable to grip. This is a substrate-source gap, not a falsification of SD-019. SD-022 substrate (limb_damage_enabled=True) provides causally independent information sources; prediction is that C1 passes 4+/5 seeds on SD-022 substrate. SD-011: reclassified non_contributory -- this experiment tests SD-019 training objective quality, not the dual-stream architecture claim itself.
